title: rootless: some cleanups for rootless_linux.c
body: one patch (`rootless: make sure the buffer is NUL terminated`) is a fix for a potential bug, since we might read more data from the stack that was read from the file.  The rest is a minor cleanup that hopefully makes the code more readable.
